input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.2.5
            TITLE: for internal combustion vehicles (ic):

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.2.5: For Internal Combustion vehicles (IC):
D.13.2.5 For Internal Combustion vehicles (IC): 
a. The Fuel Tank must be filled to the Fuel Level Line (IC.5.4.5) to measure fuel used.

final_answer: rule D.13.2.5: For Internal Combustion vehicles (IC): D.13.2.5 For Internal Combustion vehicles (IC): a. The Fuel Tank must be filled to the Fuel Level Line (IC.5.4.5) to measure fuel used.
